auth.loginDescription: Login to see your chess opening statistics.
auth.registerDescription: Create a new account and check your chess opening statistics.
auth.enterCredentials: Please enter your username and password.
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
auth.changePasswordDescription: Enter your current password and new password.

home.title: Chess Opening Stats

emptyState.title: No Data Available
emptyState.description: Link your chess account to automatically load your data.

home.syncLichessLimit: Lichess users can only fetch 20 games per second.
home.syncHikaruTip: Fetching GM Hikaru's ~60k games takes about 10 seconds.
home.syncAnalysisLimit: Analyses are performed up to 30 moves.
home.syncSuccess: Data sync job has been queued. There are {count} users ahead of you.
home.syncFailed: Sync failed. Please try again later.
home.syncFailedTryAgain: Sync failed. Please try again later.
home.exploreDescription: Enter your platform and username to visualize your opening performance.
home.syncDescription: We are fetching your latest games from {platform}. This will take a few moments.
home.bgSyncDescription: New games are still being processed. Your stats will refresh automatically.

opening.name: Opening Name
opening.bestWinRateNote: Based on openings with at least 10 games.
opening.noOpeningsFoundSearch: No openings found matching your search.
opening.boardSearchDescription: Move pieces to create a position and find matching openings.
opening.unknownOrNoGames: Unknown opening or no games played

player.addPlayerDescription: Enter the player ID and platform to link.
player.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this player connection?

myPage.title: My Page
myPage.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
myPage.syncSuccess: Sync request completed. There are {count} users currently in the queue.
myPage.syncRateLimit: Sync requests are limited to once every 10 minutes. Please try again later.
myPage.noNewGames: No new games found. Your account is already up to date.
myPage.syncComplete: Data sync complete! Your statistics are now up to date.
myPage.syncTimeout: Sync is taking longer than expected. Please refresh the page in a moment.
myPage.changePasswordPending: Password change feature is coming soon
myPage.deleteAccountPending: Account deletion feature is coming soon
myPage.removePlayerPending: Player removal feature is coming soon
